Services

What I do for small businesses.

Every project is built from scratch. No templates, no shortcuts, no handoffs to someone else.

01

Website Design
& Build

A complete custom website, designed and built around your business. From the first conversation to launch day, I handle everything: design, development, copywriting guidance, domain setup, and deployment. You get a site that looks like yours, not a template everyone else is using.

What's included

  • Custom design tailored to your brand
  • Responsive across all devices
  • SEO foundations built in
  • Fast performance and clean code
  • Full launch support
02

Custom
Development

Already have a design direction? Or need something specific that off-the-shelf tools can't handle? I build custom functionality to spec - booking systems, contact workflows, dynamic content, integrations. Whatever your business needs to actually work online.

What's included

  • Feature development to your spec
  • Third-party integrations
  • API connections
  • Performance optimisation
03

Ongoing
Maintenance

Websites need care. I offer monthly maintenance plans so your site stays updated, secure, and running well after launch. No more chasing someone for a content update or worrying about broken plugins. I handle it so you don't have to think about it.

What's included

  • Content updates
  • Security patches
  • Performance monitoring
  • Monthly reporting
04

Digital Setup
& Tech

Setting up a business online involves more than a website. I help with the surrounding tech: domain and hosting, business email, Google Business Profile, analytics, and anything else that gets your digital presence working properly from day one.

What's included

  • Domain and hosting setup
  • Business email
  • Google Business Profile
  • Analytics setup

Got a project in mind?

Let's talk about it.

Get in touch →
